current_state.summary: RAG system has SQLiteVectorStore fully implemented. Pinecone and Chroma are referenced in CLI help text but have no implementations. VectorStore interface is well-defined in vector-store.ts.

vector_store_interface.description: VectorStore interface with initialize(), add(), search(), clear(), stats() methods

sqlite_implementation.description: Reference implementation showing VectorStore interface implementation pattern

rag_index.description: Has --store flag with pinecone|chroma|sqlite options but only sqlite implemented

rag_search.description: Has --store flag with pinecone|chroma|sqlite options but only sqlite implemented

technical_risks: Pinecone requires cloud API access - integration testing needs API key
Chroma requires running server or embedded mode
Both stores need proper error handling for connection failures
mitigation: Implement fallback to SQLite if env vars not set
Add clear error messages for missing configuration
Create mock/stub implementations for unit testing

complexity_estimate.pinecone_store: medium - requires understanding Pinecone index/namespace model
complexity_estimate.chroma_store: medium - requires understanding Chroma collection model
complexity_estimate.cli_updates: low - mostly wiring existing --store flag to new implementations
complexity_estimate.testing: medium - requires both unit tests and integration tests with real services

coding_standards.typescript: Strict mode, explicit return types on public methods
coding_standards.error_handling: Use VectorStoreError with appropriate error codes
coding_standards.interface_compliance: Must implement all VectorStore interface methods
